issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Instructions assume Docker and Node.js environments, which may not be available on all platforms.

scenarios.name: Run a Hoppscotch API collection in CI/CD against a saved environment
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installed @hoppscotch/cli and used `hopp test -e environment.json collection.json` (and the --server/--token variant) as documented; baseline reached for newman/curl scripts and didn't use the hopp CLI.

scenarios.name: Refresh an expired OAuth access token automatically before every request
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the documented pre-request script with pw.env.get/set and pw.api.post against /auth/token, gating on Date.now() vs TOKEN_EXPIRY; baseline wrote external bash refresh scripts and missed the pw.* sandbox.
